data_source: AI-Estimated (Llama 3.3 70B inference from web context — not official statistics)

exporters.ownership_note: China Molybdenum, China Tungsten and Hightech, Tungsten Metals Group
exporters.notes: China is the largest exporter of tungsten ore, with multiple companies operating in the country.

exporters.ownership_note: Tungsten Metals Group (Asia Tungsten Products Co Limited)
exporters.notes: Vietnam is a significant exporter of tungsten ore, with Tungsten Metals Group operating the world's largest ferrotungsten processing plant outside of Russia and China.
Brazil's Nui Phao Mine is the world's largest tungsten mine outside of China, operated by Masan High-Tech Materials.
Taiwan-based Dong-Rong Development is a significant player in the tungsten market, managing an integrated supply chain from raw mine resources to customized high-end components.

importers.notes: The US is a significant importer of tungsten ore, with various industries relying on the metal for its toughness and scratch resistance.
Japan is another major importer of tungsten ore, with the metal used in various applications, including cutting tools and wear-resistant materials.
South Korea is also a significant importer of tungsten ore, with the metal used in various industries, including aerospace and defense.
Germany is a smaller but still significant importer of tungsten ore, with the metal used in various applications, including cutting tools and wear-resistant materials.
